languages.text: "Сервиторизируй его и отправь обратно на нижние палубы. Пусть еще послужит династии".
"Servitorise him and send him back to the lower decks. He may still serve the dynasty."
languages.original_text: "Сервиторизируй его и отправь обратно на нижние палубы. Пусть еще послужит династии".

traits.locale_text: "Servitorise him and send him back to the lower decks. He may still serve the dynasty."
"Servitorise him and send him back to the lower decks. He may still serve the dynasty."
"Only your outer shell has changed, your function remains the same. Continue what you were doing before."
"Servitorise him and send him back to the lower decks. He may still serve the dynasty."
"Servitorise him and send him back to the lower decks. He may still serve the dynasty."

languages.text: 「外見は変わったが、機能は変わらない。以前と同じように続けてくれ」
languages.original_text: "Only your outer shell has changed, your function remains the same. Continue what you were doing before."

traits.locale_text: 「外見は変わったが、機能は変わらない。以前と同じように続けてくれ。」

languages.text: “把他改造成机仆，送回下层甲板。他还能为王朝效力。”
languages.original_text: "Servitorise him and send him back to the lower decks. He may still serve the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: “把他改造成机仆，送回下层甲板。他还能为王朝效力。”

languages.text: « Servitorisez-le et renvoyez-le sur les ponts inférieurs. Il peut encore servir la dynastie. »
languages.original_text: "Servitorise him and send him back to the lower decks. He may still serve the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: « Servitorisez-le et renvoyez-le sur les ponts inférieurs. Il peut encore servir la dynastie. »

languages.text: «Servidorícenlo y envíenlo a las cubiertas inferiores. Todavía puede servir a la dinastía».
languages.original_text: "Servitorise him and send him back to the lower decks. He may still serve the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: «Servidorícenlo y envíenlo a las cubiertas inferiores. Todavía puede servir a la dinastía».

languages.text: "Onu hizmetörleştirip alt güvertelere gönder. Hanedanlığa hâlâ hizmet edebilir."
languages.original_text: "Servitorise him and send him back to the lower decks. He may still serve the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: "Onu hizmetörleştirip alt güvertelere gönder. Hanedanlığa hâlâ hizmet edebilir."

languages.text: "Servitorisiert ihn und schickt ihn zurück auf die unteren Decks. Er kann der Dynastie noch immer dienen."
languages.original_text: "Servitorise him and send him back to the lower decks. He may still serve the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: "Servitorisiert ihn und schickt ihn zurück auf die unteren Decks. Er kann der Dynastie noch immer dienen."
